creator: oliver.pntr@gmail.com
text:
hardware is HP 5310m notebook

the first syndrome is only the $subject:

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: echo "device acpi_thermal" >> KERNELCONFIG

build it, and reboot
